ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the security */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the security belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the security */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the security is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the security is listed */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the security information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security being reported on */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the security */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the security during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the security during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the security */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the security */,
  "pre_market_open" REAL /* Pre-market opening price */,
  "post_market_close" REAL /* Post-market closing price */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume for the day */,
  "data_provider" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "data_validated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data has been validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price increase, volume spike) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the alert is active */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the alert is active */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the session took place */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of trading session (e.g., regular, extended) */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "total_volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the historical price record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded price */,
  "price" REAL /* Recorded price on the specified date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance metric */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metric */,
  "return" REAL /* Return on investment for the security */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility measure for the security */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio for the security */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value for the security */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha value for the security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the transaction */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Number of shares involved in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share at the time of transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the transaction */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market, limit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the index (e.g., equity, bond) */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the index at inception */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the index is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the index is denominated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the index performance record */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metric */,
  "return" REAL /* Return metric for the index */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility metric for the index */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio for the index */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value for the index */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha value for the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_performance_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)
